items.title: [Workspace]: Strip away visible product residue that is no longer earning its keep so the system becomes easier to enter, recover, and trust without losing real leverage
[Workspace]: Design for graceful partial compliance so generic agents still get value from the package, and bypassing it becomes visible and harder to trust
[Workspace]: Make core package surfaces cheaper for generic agents to consume so using the package is easier than broad repo scavenging or private reinvention
[Workspace]: Make the default entry path easier for generic agents to discover and follow so startup compliance does not depend on deep product awareness
[Workspace]: Make core package surfaces easier for generic agents to use so package startup and state feel cheaper than ad hoc repo reading
[Review]: Surface lower-trust signals when package use was likely bypassed so review and closure do not silently assume disciplined package usage
[Workspace]: Surface dangling larger intent and lower-trust closeout signals without assuming any external planning system
[Workspace]: Make the default entry path easier for generic agents to discover and follow so startup compliance does not depend on deep product awareness
